overall.label: CRITICAL
overall.description: Maritime traffic through Hormuz has effectively ceased. Potential full blockade.

summary: Traffic through Hormuz is at ~12% of normal levels. 18 of 83 ships in the strait zone are moving. Flow balance: 6 inbound vs 7 outbound (6:7). 2061 vessels appear stranded (81045k DWT). 0 of 0 tankers transiting (baseline: 35). Overall crisis level: CRITICAL.
